name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Reflex Premium Adult Dog Food - Lamb & Rice 3kg
shortDescription: Nourish your dog with Reflex Adult Dog Food Lamb & Rice a specially formulated meal made with quality lamb to promote energy, immune health, and a shiny coat.
description: Reflex Lamb and Rice Adult Dog Food has a delicious formulation that suits dogs' palates and contains easily digestible organic ingredients for the digestive system. It supports the muscle development of dogs thanks to its high-quality protein content. It supports both the digestive system health and the immune system with its prebiotic and antioxidant content. It helps maintain healthy skin and fur structure thanks to its Omega 3 & 6 content, while also contributing to cognitive development. Ingredients: Dried animal protein, Cereals (rice, corn), Chicken fat, Corn gluten, Dried sugar beet, Wheat bran, Dried lamb protein, Liver flavor, Vitamins and minerals, Whey powder, Salt, Flaxseed, Brewer's yeast, MOS (Mannan Oligosaccharide), Yucca schidigera, Preservatives - antioxidants (E320 & E321) Minerals: Iron (3B103) 120 mg/kgIodine (3B202) 1.5 mg/kgCopper (3B405) 10 mg/kgManganese (3B502) 50 mg/kgZinc (3B603) 130 mg/kgSelenium (3B802) 0.3 mg/kg Vitamins: Vitamin A (3A672A) 18000 IU/kg, Vitamin E (3A700) 200 mg/kg, Vitamin D3 (3A671) 1500 IU/kg, Choline (3A890) 2500 mg/kg, Vitamin B1 (3A821), Vitamin B2, B3 (Niacin-3A315), B7 (Biotin-3A880), B9 (Folic Acid-3A316), Vitamin B12 Nutrient Components Crude Protein 24% Crude Oil 12% Raw Ash 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) 3%   Nutritional Additives Vitamin A (3A672A) 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3 (3A671) 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E (3A700) 200 mg/kg Choline (3A890) 2,500 mg/kg Nature miraculously provided omega 3 & 6 balance using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increases the absorption of nutrients. The immune system is strengthened, animals grow and performance improves. Good intestinal health and performance are achieved with pathogen-binding mannan oligosaccharide , immunogenic beta-glucans , and CitriStim , an immune-boosting yeast source. Brewer's yeast is used for healthy skin and shiny coat. Whey is used to strengthen the immune system. Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported. Enriched with vitamins and minerals .             Feed Suggestions The amount of food to be given per day may vary depending on the outdoor temperature, the living conditions of your dog (inside / outside the house), its character and activity. It is important to weigh the amount of food so that your dog can be an ideal weight. It will be helpful to evaluate your dog's appetite, appearance and digestion when properly adjusting the amount of food to be given. Additional Tips Transition from one food to another must be made progressively by feeding small amounts of both foods for one week after mixing. Always keep clean and fresh water near the food bowl. Change it at least once a day. Store the product in a dry and cool place, and be sure to close the packaging thoroughly after each use.
